---
title: "Upload Raw Data"
author: "World Bank / UNHCR Joint Team"
date: today
---

## Overview

Before a survey can be harmonized, its raw microdata should exist on **Datalibweb**. If a raw dataset is not already available there (e.g. on the GMD server), it must first be uploaded through
**PRIMUS**.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Check first
Query Datalibweb to confirm whether the raw survey is already present before starting a new upload transaction.
:::

## Uploading via PRIMUS

Raw files are uploaded as a PRIMUS **transaction** using the `FDPRaw-data` process (`processid = 39`) by users with uploader status. A raw data upload starts with a `new` file that returns a transaction ID; additional files are then attached to that same transaction ID. Specify the destination `folderpath` and `type(raw)`.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Include supporting documents
Upload the survey **documentation and
questionnaires** together with the raw data (to the process's documents folder,
e.g. `Doc/`), so the source instruments travel with the microdata on Datalibweb.
Add them as additional files on the same transaction ID.
:::

Two clients are available: the [`primus` R
package](https://github.com/worldbank/primus-r) (cross-platform) and the
[`primus` Stata package](https://github.com/worldbank/primus-stata) (Windows). Both
call the same PRIMUS API; use whichever matches your harmonization workflow.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## R

```r
library(primus)

# Discover the processes you can act on
primus_list_processes()

# What folders / extensions does the process accept?
primus_folders(process_name = "RAWPROC")

# Upload a raw data file (creates a new transaction)
up <- primus_upload(
  process_name = "RAWPROC",
  survey_id    = "AGO_2029_HBS_V01_M",
  type         = "raw",
  infile       = "subin.dta",
  folder_name  = "Data/Stata"
)

# Add additional files to the same transaction
primus_upload(
  process_name   = "RAWPROC",
  survey_id      = "AGO_2029_HBS_V01_M",
  type           = "raw",
  infile         = "deflators.dta",
  folder_name    = "Data/Stata",
  transaction_id = up$transaction_id
)

# Alternatively, upload a zip that mirrors the process folder structure
primus_upload(
  process_name = "RAWPROC",
  survey_id    = "AGO_2029_HBS_V01_M",
  type         = "raw",
  infile       = "AGO_2029_HBS_v01_M.zip",
  zip          = TRUE,
  new          = TRUE
)

# Confirm the draft transaction once all files are attached
primus_confirm(up$transaction_id, comments = "raw data ready for review")
```

## Stata

```stata
* Check the processes you can act on
primus list, proc

* What folders / extensions does the process accept?
primus folders, proc(6)

* Upload a raw data file as a NEW transaction; the transaction ID is returned
primus upload, processid(6) surveyid(AGO_2029_HBS_V01_M) ///
    type(raw) folderpath(Data/Stata) infile(c:\Temp\subin.dta) new

* Add other files to the SAME transaction ID reported above
primus upload, proc(6) surveyid(AGO_2029_HBS_V01_M) ///
    type(raw) folderpath(Data/Stata) infile(c:\Temp\spatial_deflators.dta) ///
    tranxid(006-000327173-MNARAW-AGO-12944)

* Alternatively, upload a zip that mirrors the process folder structure
primus upload, processid(6) surveyid(AGO_2029_HBS_V01_M) ///
    type(raw) infile(c:\Temp\AGO_2029_HBS_v01_M.zip) zip new

* Confirm the draft transaction (uploader step)
primus action, tranxid(006-000327173-MNARAW-AGO-12944) proc(6) ///
    decision(confirm) comments(raw data ready for review)
```

:::

## Authentication

Both clients use the same **Datalibweb token** (valid 30 days, renewed on the
Datalibweb website).

::: {.panel-tabset}

## R

`primus` defaults to the **plugin gateway**, which reuses the same Datalibweb bearer
token as the `dlw` R package. Store it once (shared with `dlw`):

```r
primus_set_token("<your Datalibweb token>")
```

See the package's `authentication` vignette for the Azure AD gateway, used only for
endpoints not exposed on the plugin gateway.

## Stata

Register the token copied from the Datalibweb website before running PRIMUS
commands:

```stata
primus register, token(<your Datalibweb token>)
```

:::

## Reviewing & approving via PRIMUS

Once the uploader confirms the transaction, it is queued for review by users with approver status. Reviewers can approve or reject the transaction. If approved, the files are published to Datalibweb and become available for harmonization. If rejected, the uploader is notified and can correct the files and resubmit.

The raw files become the input to the [harmonization step](02-harmonization.qmd).

::: {.panel-tabset}

## R

```r
library(primus)

# Check pending transactions for review
primus_list_transactions(process_name = "RAWPROC", status = "pending")

# download the files for review
primus_download(
  process_name   = "RAWPROC",
  survey_id      = "AGO_2029_HBS_V01_M",
  transaction_id = "006-000327173-MNARAW-AGO-12944",
  dest_dir       = "c:/Temp/AGO_2029_HBS_V01_M"
)

# Approve a transaction
primus_action(
  process_name   = "RAWPROC",
  survey_id      = "AGO_2029_HBS_V01_M",
  transaction_id = "006-000327173-MNARAW-AGO-12944",
  decision       = "approve",
  comments       = "raw data approved for harmonization"
)

```

## Stata

```stata

* Check pending transactions for review
primus list, proc(6) status(pending)

* download the files for review
primus download, proc(6) surveyid(AGO_2029_HBS_V01_M) tranxid(006-000327173-MNARAW-AGO-12944) ///
    destdir(c:\Temp\AGO_2029_HBS_V01_M)

* Approve a transaction
primus action, tranxid(006-000327173-MNARAW-AGO-12944) proc(6) ///
    decision(approve) comments("raw data approved for harmonization")

```

:::
